{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Galactic Union's Magic Tower
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Magic Tower]] is located on an artificial moon belonging to the [[Galactic Union]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
